title: ZSpeed
description: A Speedster Type Mod Made by Yours Truly -Zacronium!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/549ab9eb9a29824a8ecd01cbfd52de3d6b1efcd4.png)
What you need to know!


YOU NEED THESE MODS:
tickrate api
player animator

There are currently 3 suits:
^ Flash
^ Reverse Flash
^ Zoom

Key Bindings:
Y = Increase Speed
H = Decrease Speed
R = Enable/Disable Speed

There Is a small meter at the bottom of your screen.

![Speedster Level up bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e53f1e4507517423d2dd94b61107322bcd998ee.png)

Use Jei or go to [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zspeed](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zspeed) to see the recipies!

 

Suit Textures:

I had some preset suits I didn't make, I took them out but now only the flash suit has a texture, they still work. They just don't have textures. I will work on them!

 

Bugs:
There are a few Bugs that I am aware of and trying to fix!

^ Crash - Index (number prob 20-30) Invalid in length 0, This is a bug with the trail, its not you, and its rare. But It can happen, I will try to eliminate it in future versions.

^ Trail is off!!! - At a 45 degree and -135 degree angle the trail is not directly behind the player. I'm not entirely sure why this is. But I will continue to crack at it in the future.

^ Other Players can't see my trail! - This is because of how I render the trail. I render it directly to the client and not the game itself. I will work on multiplayer compatibility, But Its not here yet!


 

MULTIPLAYER IS RESTRICTED:

The way I coded some of the features makes it single player only. This mod WILL work in multiplayer, It just wont look as cool :( , I am working on making it compatible, but for now, Only you can see your trail. 

 
I will update this mod over time (especially if yall like it)
